title: RBI (Regional Rural Banks – Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Second Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI amended capital adequacy norms for Regional Rural Banks by allowing a zero percent risk weight for specified ECLGS 5.0 exposures. The decision recognizes the reduced credit risk arising from government-backed guarantees.
The post RBI (Regional Rural Banks – Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Second Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
